## What this changes

<!-- A short, plain-language summary. What does this do, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Tests green** — `agix agent eval --all` passes.
- [ ] **Public-clean** — the public-clean gate passes on anything public-bound (no secrets, real emails, client identifiers, or private-repo references).
- [ ] **DCO signed** — every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Scoped — only the files this change intends to touch are staged.
- [ ] A human author understands and can defend this change.
